<insights>

- High cohesion (0.95) — files are tightly interconnected
- Contains the bulk of the presentation layer with reusable components across multiple views
- Provides specialized data display components for complex domain objects like findings and health metrics
- Maintains strong cohesion despite large size, indicating well-organized component architecture
- High cohesion (0.95) across 92 files demonstrates excellent component organization and reusability
- Multiple entry points suggest well-designed component exports with clear public APIs
- Specialized data display components provide domain-specific visualizations for complex analysis results
- Functions as the shared component library that enables code reuse across different UI domains while maintaining architectural boundaries
- Provides domain-agnostic visualization components that can be composed by specialized zones like prd-management-ui
- Clean provider-consumer relationship with prd-management-ui - shared components are consumed without internal coupling
- Component organization follows nested directory structure with logical grouping: data-display/, navigation/, sidebar/ indicating mature component taxonomy
- Health gauge and findings visualization components suggest sophisticated domain-aware UI patterns for complex analysis data
- Multiple index.ts files at different levels create hierarchical export structure enabling selective component imports
- Consider establishing consistent component naming convention - some use kebab-case (collapsible-section.ts) while others may follow different patterns
- [call graph] 632 internal calls, 1 outgoing, 1 incoming (cohesion: 1, coupling: 0)

</insights>
